TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Moe_Barr, title = Moe_Barr, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moe_Barr} }

S.FORM: Moe Barr sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 6, Moe Barr, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Moe Barr sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 6, Moe Barr, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: moe βarr s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, moe βarr, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
